more.title: Nomvelo Sibanda to lead as Zimbabwe announce squad for Pakistan tour
more.description: The Sentinel Nomvelo Sibanda will lead the side as Zimbabwe Cricket (ZC) unveiled a new-look women’s squad for their upcoming white-ball tour of Pakistan. The 15-player squad features 10 new faces with only five players retained from the previous tour against New Zealand in March.
